title: Too Many Paintings!
description: More paintings for Minecraft, includes famous paintings too!
body:
<center>

[![BisectHosting Sponsor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/T8Fpxcl7/images/b2d0181c9de5cc5c2b778de2105fa8329eeb1d33.png)](https://url-shortener.curseforge.com/voMOm)

</center>

<center>

![Too Many Paintings!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/T8Fpxcl7/images/b082e8bc447ae9e446948c356bbdedd7a2bea422.png)

</center>

**Make over 50+ new paintings** instantly available in your Minecraft world! Bored of the limited painting options? This mod unlocks a treasure trove of artistic possibilities. [Check out the gallery to see more](https://modrinth.com/project/too-many-paintings/gallery).

## 🖼️ More Paintings

- Famous Paintings: Adorn your Minecraft halls with iconic works from legendary artists like Van Gogh, da Vinci, and more!
- Works with Your Current World: This mod seamlessly integrates with your existing world, allowing you to instant place the new paintings anywhere.

[![Saving for a laptop!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9rlXSyLg/images/491c87c96cd602ec45774ce0b0cb9fe4d25ba074.png)](https://paypal.me/kevgelhorn)

<center>
